name: Waystream Holding AB (publ)
summary: Waystream Holding AB (publ) provides a portfolio of service routers and switches that are used in the areas of high speed broadband service networks. The company offers Ethernet and IP/MPLS network routers; gigabit Ethernet L2+ access switches; and layer 3 gigabit Ethernet access switches, as well as optical accessories. It also provides technical support, training, and professional services. In addition, the company offers various solutions, such as fiber fidelity, IPTV monitoring, software defined networking and fiber to the home, MPC scenarios, pay-as-you-grow, broadband network gateway, and point-to-point technology solutions. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.
